channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 3.4%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): ‘It’s more incrementalism’: Starmer’s safe king’s speech fails to quell mutiny
item.description: ‘It’s more incrementalism’: Starmer’s safe king’s speech fails to quell mutiny

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer biographer warns Labour risks ‘real chance’ of changing leaders again before election if it ousts him now
item.description: Starmer biographer warns Labour risks ‘real chance’ of changing leaders again before election if it ousts him now

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Reform councillor who said Holocaust was a ‘hoax’ quits party days after being elected
item.description: Reform councillor who said Holocaust was a ‘hoax’ quits party days after being elected

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Wes Streeting poised to resign to force leadership election against Starmer
item.description: Wes Streeting poised to resign to force leadership election against Starmer

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer-Streeting latest: PM meets Labour ministers to shore up support as leadership challenge looms
item.description: Starmer-Streeting latest: PM meets Labour ministers to shore up support as leadership challenge looms

item.title: BBC Politics: From tourist tax to digital ID: BBC correspondents on the key bills in the King's Speech
item.description: From tourist tax to digital ID: BBC correspondents on the key bills in the King's Speech

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer has ‘full confidence’ in Streeting despite health secretary’s allies saying he is planning to resign – as it happened
item.description: Starmer has ‘full confidence’ in Streeting despite health secretary’s allies saying he is planning to resign – as it happened

item.title: ITVX: Keir Starmer addresses Commons amid Labour Party turmoil - ITVX
item.description: Keir Starmer addresses Commons amid Labour Party turmoil - ITVX

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour politicians should put the country before their party | Letters
item.description: Labour politicians should put the country before their party | Letters

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): King’s speech might be the last word on Starmer as reluctant monarch does his duty | John Crace
item.description: King’s speech might be the last word on Starmer as reluctant monarch does his duty | John Crace
